title: OKICRAFT
description: Built for my community — exploration, tech & magic
body:
# OKICRAFT

![okicraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57c891adcac051e8efa36b285d361f0427af1983.png)

A modpack built for my community — designed to give us the best Minecraft experience together.

## ✨ What's Inside

**🗺️ Exploration**
Discover hundreds of new biomes with Terralith, Biomes O' Plenty, and Oh The Biomes We've Gone. Every dungeon has been overhauled by YUNG's Better series, and the Twilight Forest awaits with its own dimension of adventure.

**⚙️ Technology**
Build intricate factories with Create, manage digital storage with AE2, and automate everything with Thermal machines and Sophisticated Storage.

**⚔️ Adventure**
Face new challenges with Apotheosis bosses, discover Artifacts, and encounter 80+ new creatures from Alex's Mobs.

**🏠 Building**
Express yourself with Macaw's complete collection, Handcrafted furniture, and Supplementaries decorations.

**🎭 Social**
Talk with friends using Simple Voice Chat and customize your look with Yes Steve Model!

## 🚀 Performance

Optimized with ModernFix, FerriteCore, and Embeddium. Runs smoothly on 6GB+ RAM.

## 📦 Recommended Extras

For the best experience, grab these optional additions:
- **Shaders:** Complementary Reimagined or Miniature Shader
- **Resource Packs:** Fresh Animations, Beautiful Enchanted Books

---

*Made with love for my community. Hope we get to keep this going!* 💖
